requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness, EMC, and Power Quality

summary.en: Comoros does not have a mature public EV charging network, so networked charger communication requirements are likely to be project-led. If a public, fleet, hotel, airport, or utility project requires managed charging, the charger should support the OCPP version, security profile, SIM/router arrangement, metering interface, and back-office integration specified by the project owner. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared under IEC 61000 series expectations for a 220/380 V 50 Hz grid, including harmonic current, flicker, surge immunity, conducted emissions, radiated emissions, and voltage-dip performance.
summary.zh: 科摩罗尚无成熟公共电动汽车充电网络，因此联网充电桩通信要求很可能由项目主导。如果公共、车队、酒店、机场或公用事业项目要求受管理充电，充电桩应支持项目业主指定的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM/路由器安排、计量接口和后台集成。EMC及电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列预期准备，并适配220/380 V 50 Hz电网，包括谐波电流、闪变、浪涌抗扰、传导发射、辐射发射和电压暂降性能。
summary.zht: 科摩羅尚無成熟公共電動汽車充電網絡，因此聯網充電樁通訊要求很可能由項目主導。如果公共、車隊、酒店、機場或公用事業項目要求受管理充電，充電樁應支持項目業主指定的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM/路由器安排、計量接口和後台集成。EMC及電能質量證據應按IEC 61000系列預期準備，並適配220/380 V 50 Hz電網，包括諧波電流、閃變、浪湧抗擾、傳導發射、輻射發射和電壓暫降性能。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked chargers where specified by project owner
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — DC charging digital communication where CCS2 DC is specified
SONELEC grid quality and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. That vehicle-side DC communication is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack. China EMC reports can support engineering review, but evidence should be checked against IEC 61000 clauses and Comoros site conditions.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间。该车侧直流通信不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2所需的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈。中国EMC报告可支持工程审查，但应按IEC 61000条款和科摩罗场地条件进行核查。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間。該車側直流通訊不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2所需的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧。中國EMC報告可支持工程審查，但應按IEC 61000條款和科摩羅場地條件進行核查。

standards_or_laws: China GB/T EMC test evidence where available

gap.en: Exporters should confirm whether the project needs OCPP at all, and if so the exact version, security profile, certificate handling, local telecom bands, roaming SIM arrangement, data retention, remote firmware update process, and integration test plan. For EMC, prepare IEC 61000 evidence and harmonic data for SONELEC review. GB/T 27930 cannot be presented as OCPP, and China-only EMC evidence should be mapped to IEC clauses before claiming Comoros readiness.
gap.zh: 出口商应先确认项目是否需要OCPP，如需要，应确认具体版本、安全配置、证书处理、本地通信频段、漫游SIM安排、数据留存、远程固件更新流程和集成测试计划。EMC方面，应准备IEC 61000证据和谐波数据供SONELEC审查。GB/T 27930不能被作为OCPP提交，仅有中国EMC证据时，应先映射到IEC条款再宣称适配科摩罗。
gap.zht: 出口商應先確認項目是否需要OCPP，如需要，應確認具體版本、安全配置、證書處理、本地通訊頻段、漫遊SIM安排、數據留存、遠程固件更新流程和集成測試計劃。EMC方面，應準備IEC 61000證據和諧波數據供SONELEC審查。GB/T 27930不能被作為OCPP提交，僅有中國EMC證據時，應先映射到IEC條款再宣稱適配科摩羅。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP is mandatory only where required by the Comoros project owner or operator; EMC and power-quality evidence are expected for SONELEC grid-connected installations
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 applies to China domestic DC charging communication and is not an OCPP or CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Comoros networked charger requirements will likely be project-led. Confirm whether OCPP is required, prepare it separately from GB/T 27930, and map EMC and power-quality evidence to IEC 61000 for the 220/380 V 50 Hz site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科摩罗联网充电桩要求很可能由项目主导。应确认是否需要OCPP，并将其与GB/T 27930分开准备；同时将EMC及电能质量证据映射至IEC 61000并适配220/380 V 50 Hz场地。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科摩羅聯網充電樁要求很可能由項目主導。應確認是否需要OCPP，並將其與GB/T 27930分開準備；同時將EMC及電能質量證據映射至IEC 61000並適配220/380 V 50 Hz場地。
